content_fingerprint: hugging face gradio spaces now serve ai agent readable api descriptions by default every gradio space on hugging face now automatically exposes an agents md endpoint letting coding agents like claude code codex and pi discover and interact with a space without manual configuration hugging face has updated gradio spaces so that every hosted space now auto generates and serves an agents md endpoint a machine readable api description that ai agents can read on their own to understand how to use the space what inputs it accepts and what outputs it produces the change went live around april 17 2026
